prompt: Design a children's educational platform with bright rainbow colors, cartoon mascot characters, gamified learning modules, sticker reward systems, and playful animated transitions between sections
prompt_refined: Generate a high-fidelity screenshot of a children's educational platform user interface. The design should predominantly feature a vibrant rainbow color palette (red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple hues). A friendly, cheerful cartoon mascot character is prominently displayed on the screen, possibly at the bottom-center or side. The central area of the UI presents multiple interactive gamified learning modules, depicted as colorful, distinct activity cards or levels arranged in a grid. On the top-right or top-left, incorporate a visible sticker reward system, showcasing collected stickers or a progress bar towards rewards. All UI elements, including buttons and borders, should have soft, rounded edges and a playful aesthetic, suggesting dynamic, animated transitions.
objects: Friendly, cheerful cartoon mascot character (prominently displayed, bottom-center or side)
Multiple interactive gamified learning modules (as colorful activity cards or levels)
Learning modules arranged in a grid (in the central area)
Visible sticker reward system (on the top-right or top-left)
Collected stickers or a progress bar (within the reward system)
UI elements with soft, rounded edges
Vibrant rainbow color palette (predominant UI theme)
